evals.prompt: 帮我给这个 NestJS 后端项目生成完整的文档结构，让 AI 编码工具能更好地理解这个项目
evals.expected_output: Should generate an appropriate root entry-point file (CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md), ARCHITECTURE.md, and docs/ directory with API.md, DESIGN.md, SECURITY.md, TESTING.md, QUALITY_SCORE.md. Should detect NestJS backend type and skip FRONTEND.md. Content should reference actual NestJS modules and services found in the project.

assertions.name: entry-point-exists
assertions.description: Generated a CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md entry-point file

assertions.name: architecture-exists
assertions.description: Generated an ARCHITECTURE.md file

assertions.name: docs-dir-exists
assertions.description: Generated a docs/ directory with at least 2 files

assertions.name: project-type-correct
assertions.description: Correctly identified as backend: has API.md or similar, does NOT have FRONTEND.md

assertions.name: content-is-specific
assertions.description: Documentation references actual project files/modules

assertions.name: cross-links-valid
assertions.description: Every document mentioned in the entry-point file actually exists

evals.prompt: 这个 Vue 管理后台项目需要文档，请帮我创建一个完整的渐进式披露文档体系
evals.expected_output: Should generate an appropriate root entry-point file (CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md), ARCHITECTURE.md, and docs/ with FRONTEND.md, DESIGN.md, SECURITY.md, QUALITY_SCORE.md, PRODUCT_SENSE.md. Should detect Vue3 + Vite frontend type.

assertions.name: entry-point-exists
assertions.description: Generated a CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md entry-point file

assertions.name: frontend-doc-exists
assertions.description: Generated a FRONTEND.md covering frontend-specific concerns

assertions.name: no-irrelevant-backend-docs
assertions.description: Does NOT generate DATABASE.md for a frontend-only project

assertions.name: content-is-specific
assertions.description: Documentation mentions actual tech stack: Vue3, Vite, Pinia, TypeScript

assertions.name: design-system-covered
assertions.description: FRONTEND.md or DESIGN.md covers component organization, routing, or state management

assertions.name: cross-links-valid
assertions.description: Every document mentioned in the entry-point file actually exists

evals.prompt: set up docs for this project so AI agents can understand it better
evals.expected_output: Should generate a minimal but useful doc set appropriate for a tiny Express project. Should NOT over-generate. The chosen root entry-point file should be concise.

assertions.name: entry-point-exists
assertions.description: Generated a CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md entry-point file

assertions.name: proportional-output
assertions.description: Generated a reasonable number of docs (not more than 6-7 files total)

assertions.name: content-not-boilerplate
assertions.description: Documentation references actual code from index.js

assertions.name: entry-point-concise
assertions.description: Entry-point file is concise and proportional to project size (under 80 lines)

evals.prompt: 这个 Express 项目团队同时使用 Claude Code 和 Codex，请同时生成 CLAUDE.md 和 AGENTS.md，并让它们指向同一套 docs/
evals.expected_output: Should generate both CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md, keep their documentation maps and architecture pointers aligned, and write a shared docs/ structure without vendor-specific drift in the common sections.

assertions.name: both-entry-files-exist
assertions.description: Generated both CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md

assertions.name: entry-files-aligned
assertions.description: CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md point to the same core docs and architecture file

assertions.name: shared-doc-map
assertions.description: Both root files reference the same docs/ document set

assertions.name: limited-tool-specific-differences
assertions.description: Differences between the two root files are limited to small tool-specific notes
